stemHtml: Select the option which correctly completes the above statement. A stall warning system (1) _____ and the stall protection system (2) _____.

options.a:
(1) Alerts the pilot
(2) Prevents the stall
options.b:
(1) Prevents the stall
(2) Alerts the pilot
options.c:
(1) Alerts the pilot
(2) Alerts the pilot
options.d:
(1) Prevents the stall
(2) Prevents the stall
